description: Storage interface must be consistent across platforms

articles.name: getArticlesByMonth
articles.description: Get all articles for a specific month (YYYY-MM format)

articles.name: getAllArticles
articles.description: Get all articles across all months

summaries.name: saveSummary
summaries.description: Save or update a daily summary (synced to cloud with 7-day retention)

summaries.name: getSummaryByTopic
summaries.description: Get the most recent non-expired summary for a topic

topicActivity.name: logTopicActivity
topicActivity.description: Log that a summary was generated for a topic on today's date

topicActivity.name: getActiveTopicIdsForQuarter
topicActivity.description: Get unique topic IDs that had summaries generated in a quarter (YYYY-QN format)

bookLists.name: saveBookList
bookLists.description: Save or update a quarterly book list for a specific topic

bookLists.name: getBookListByQuarterAndTopic
bookLists.description: Get book list for a specific quarter and topic

bookLists.name: getBookListsByQuarter
bookLists.description: Get all book lists for a quarter (across all topics)
